net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.commands

Class ExportDataCommand

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.eclipse.emf.common.command.AbstractCommand
      • net.bhl.cdt.commands.CDTCommand
        • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.ui.commands.ExportDataCommand
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.common.command.Command

    public class ExportDataCommand
extends net.bhl.cdt.commands.CDTCommand
    This command exports important data from the EMF meta-model.
    Since:
    0.7
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    michael.schmidt
